---
title: "Contact"
toc: false
format-links: false
---

The best way to reach me is by email: [jrosenb8\@utk.edu](mailto:jrosenb8@utk.edu).

[Email Josh](mailto:jrosenb8@utk.edu){.btn .btn-primary}

**Office:** 513 Claxton, 1122 Volunteer Blvd., Knoxville, TN 37996

A few notes, depending on why you're writing:

- **Prospective students:** If you're interested in graduate study in educational data science, data science education, or STEM education, please include a short note about your background and interests — I'm happy to talk. You may also want to look at the [Making Data Science Count](https://makingdatasciencecount.com/) research group and the [Educational Data Science Graduate Certificate](https://volsonline.utk.edu/programs-degrees/educational-data-science-gc/).

- **Collaborators and partners:** For research partnerships or school and community collaborations, a short description of the opportunity or question is plenty.

- **Media, speaking, and conferences:** Please include the topic, date, and format.

## Elsewhere

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=nxVowRQAAAAJ)
- [UTK faculty page](https://cehhs.utk.edu/tpte/people/joshua-rosenberg-phd/)
- [Making Data Science Count](https://makingdatasciencecount.com/)
- [Educated Guesses (newsletter)](https://joshuamrosenberg.substack.com/)
